description: Analyze AlphaFold structure confidence for tam10 to assess structural disorder and domain architecture
code:
import requests
import json

# Check AlphaFold confidence for tam10
# Download the PDB and check pLDDT scores
af_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-G2TRQ9-F1-model_v6.pdb"
response = requests.get(af_url)
if response.status_code == 200:
    pdb_content = response.text
    lines = pdb_content.split('\n')
    
    # Extract pLDDT scores from B-factor column (columns 61-66 in ATOM records)
    residue_plddt = {}
    for line in lines:
        if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
            resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
            plddt = float(line[60:66].strip())
            residue_plddt[resnum] = plddt
    
    print(f"=== AlphaFold pLDDT scores for tam10 ===")
    print(f"Number of residues: {len(residue_plddt)}")
    
    # Calculate statistics
    plddt_values = list(residue_plddt.values())
    import numpy as np
    print(f"Mean pLDDT: {np.mean(plddt_values):.1f}")
    print(f"Median pLDDT: {np.median(plddt_values):.1f}")
    print(f"Min pLDDT: {np.min(plddt_values):.1f}")
    print(f"Max pLDDT: {np.max(plddt_values):.1f}")
    
    # Categorize
    very_high = sum(1 for v in plddt_values if v >= 90)
    high = sum(1 for v in plddt_values if 70 <= v < 90)
    low = sum(1 for v in plddt_values if 50 <= v < 70)
    very_low = sum(1 for v in plddt_values if v < 50)
    
    print(f"\nConfidence categories:")
    print(f"  Very high (≥90): {very_high} ({100*very_high/len(plddt_values):.1f}%)")
    print(f"  High (70-90): {high} ({100*high/len(plddt_values):.1f}%)")
    print(f"  Low (50-70): {low} ({100*low/len(plddt_values):.1f}%)")
    print(f"  Very low (<50): {very_low} ({100*very_low/len(plddt_values):.1f}%)")
    
    # Show per-region scores
    print(f"\nPer-region average pLDDT:")
    regions = {
        "N-term disordered (1-35)": range(1, 36),
        "Coiled-coil (35-95)": range(35, 96),
        "Disordered (48-97)": range(48, 98),
        "SMAP domain (101-167)": range(101, 168),
        "C-term disordered (126-168)": range(126, 169)
    }
    for name, rng in regions.items():
        region_plddt = [residue_plddt.get(r, 0) for r in rng if r in residue_plddt]
        if region_plddt:
            print(f"  {name}: {np.mean(region_plddt):.1f}")
    
    # Plot pLDDT profile
    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
    resnums = sorted(residue_plddt.keys())
    plddts = [residue_plddt[r] for r in resnums]
    
    ax.plot(resnums, plddts, 'b-', linewidth=1.5)
    ax.fill_between(resnums, plddts, alpha=0.3)
    ax.set_xlabel('Residue number')
    ax.set_ylabel('pLDDT score')
    ax.set_title('AlphaFold pLDDT confidence for tam10 (G2TRQ9)')
    ax.set_ylim(0, 100)
    ax.axhline(y=70, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Confident threshold')
    ax.axhline(y=50, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Low confidence threshold')
    
    # Annotate regions
    ax.axvspan(101, 167, alpha=0.1, color='green', label='SMAP domain')
    ax.axvspan(35, 95, alpha=0.1, color='blue', label='Coiled-coil')
    
    ax.legend(fontsize=8)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig('tam10_plddt.png', dpi=150)
    plt.show()
    print("\nPlot saved: tam10_plddt.png")
else:
    print(f"Failed to download AlphaFold PDB: {response.status_code}")
